presenters.title: Presenter Management

presenters.name: Name

presenters.broadcastPermissionDesc: Allows the presenter to broadcast when a scheduled program exists
presenters.singleStationDesc: Belongs to one internal station only. Enters the studio via the program schedule.
presenters.singleStationBadge: Uses program schedule — linked to one station only
presenters.multiStationDesc: Can be linked to multiple stations. Fully managed by admin. Uses program schedule.
presenters.multiStationBadge: Uses program schedule — can be linked to multiple stations
presenters.directDjDesc: Outside the station and schedule system entirely. Connects directly to personal radios.
presenters.directDjBadge: Bypasses program schedule — connects directly to personal radios
presenters.leaveBlankToKeep: Leave blank to keep the current password
presenters.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this presenter?

presenters.disableAllProgramsConfirm: All programs for this presenter will be disabled. Recordings will not be deleted.

presenters.inactiveProgramsInfo: ℹ {count} disabled program(s) kept for history — does not block deletion.
presenters.recordingsBlocking: 🔴 Recordings block permanent deletion (database constraint). Delete recordings manually from the recordings page first.
presenters.cleanupLiveSessionsConfirm: Are you sure? Historical live session records for this presenter will be deleted. Audio recordings will not be deleted from here.
presenters.liveSessionsBlocking: Live sessions block permanent deletion until cleaned up. Recordings must be deleted first if they exist.

presenters.deleteSonicPanelConfirm: SonicPanel credentials for this presenter will be deleted.
presenters.deleteValidityConfirm: Broadcast validity data for this presenter will be deleted.
presenters.profileAutoDelete: ℹ Automatically deleted during the permanent deletion process.

presenters.accountTypeDesc: Account type determines studio behavior and credentials.

presenters.savedPresenter: Presenter data and broadcast schedule saved successfully.
presenters.singleStationLocked: This account is linked to one station and cannot be changed from this page. Contact the developer if you need to switch stations.
presenters.noStationAssigned: No station assigned yet. Use the new presenter page to assign a station or contact the developer.
presenters.multiStationEditHint: Select the stations this presenter is allowed to broadcast on. Cannot remove a station that has programs linked to this presenter.
presenters.stationErrorPrograms: Cannot remove the station because the presenter has programs linked to it. Delete the programs first.

stations.subtitle: Add and edit radio stations
stations.djCredentialsSaved: Station default DJ credentials saved successfully.
stations.stationCreatedWithDj: Station created and default DJ credentials saved successfully.

stations.listenDomainHelp: For public listening link, not DJ credentials
stations.listenPortHelp: This is not the DJ / Source Port
stations.publicPlayerUrlHelp: URL displayed to management or listeners, not presenter connection data
stations.defaultDjHelp: Used as a fallback for any presenter on this station if they don't have their own DJ credentials. Applies to the station level only, not a specific presenter.
stations.leaveBlankToKeep: Leave blank to keep current password
stations.optionalDjHelp: Optional - Used as a fallback for any presenter on this station if they don't have specific DJ credentials. Leave all fields empty or fill them all.
stations.requiredIfDjEntered: Required if you entered DJ data
stations.tryAdjustFilters: Try adjusting or clearing your filters.
stations.addFirstStation: Add your first station using the form above.
stations.filterSearchPlaceholder: Search by station name, slug, or description...
stations.dependencyWarning: Red dependencies must be cleared before hard deletion.
stations.hardDeleteBlockedDesc: Station cannot be deleted until the following are cleared:
stations.readyForDeleteDesc: All critical dependencies are cleared. Recordings are kept and will be detached automatically. Presenter accounts and data will not be deleted.
stations.hardDeleteConfirmEnd:
will be permanently deleted.

• Presenter and manager accounts will not be deleted.
• Recordings will not be deleted — they will just be detached from the station.

This action cannot be undone.
stations.noProgramsNote: No programs - station can be deleted.
stations.hasProgramsNote: All programs must be deleted first (direct FK dependency). Recordings will be preserved.
stations.deleteProgramsConfirm:
Are you sure? All programs ({n}) linked to the station will be deleted.

Recordings will not be deleted - they will just be detached from programs.
Schedule rules and slots will be deleted automatically.
stations.hasPresentersNote: {n} link(s) will be automatically deleted when the station is deleted (Cascade). Presenter accounts will not be deleted.
stations.unlinkPresentersConfirm: Are you sure? {n} presenter links to this station will be disabled.\n\nPresenter accounts will not be deleted. DIRECT_DJ presenters will not be affected.
stations.noSinglePresentersNote: No presenters linked to this station only.
stations.hasSinglePresentersNote: ⚠️ {n} SINGLE_STATION presenter(s) linked only to this station. After station deletion, they will have no station - make sure to assign them elsewhere or delete them first.
stations.hasManagersNote: {n} assignment(s) will be automatically deleted when the station is deleted. Manager accounts will not be deleted.
stations.removeManagersConfirm: Are you sure? {n} manager assignments will be removed from this station.\n\nManager accounts will not be deleted.
stations.hasDjCredentialNote: Default DJ credentials ({username}) will be automatically deleted when the station is deleted (Cascade).
stations.deleteDjCredentialConfirm: Are you sure? The station's default DJ credentials will be deleted.
stations.hasRecordingsNote: {n} recording(s) - will not be deleted when station is deleted. They will only be detached (stationId → null). Audio files are preserved.
stations.hasSonicNote: {n} record(s) - will be detached (stationId → null) without being deleted.
stations.hasSchedulesNote: {n} legacy broadcast schedule(s) - will be detached (stationId → null) without being deleted.

stations.errSlugInvalid: Invalid slug. Use English letters, numbers, and dashes only.
stations.errPortInvalid: Port number must be between 1 and 65535.
stations.errDjPortInvalid: DJ Port must be between 1 and 65535.
stations.errDjBitrateInvalid: DJ Bitrate must be between 8 and 320 kbps.

status.title: System Status
status.subtitle: Monitor system health and services
status.mod1Detail: Auth.js v5 · JWT · bcrypt · /admin route protection
status.mod2Detail: Full CRUD · Admin table · Route protection · Next.js 15 params fix
status.mod3Detail: allowConnectMinutesBefore · Check current time against schedule
status.mod4Detail: AES-256-GCM · Encrypted storage in database · Decryption on demand
status.mod5Detail: BACKGROUND / SONG sections · Track management · Full admin interface
status.mod6Detail: Same Auth.js system · role=PRESENTER · Auto redirect to /studio
status.mod7Detail: Live second-by-second countdown · Self-updating · Entry button when time is up
status.mod8Detail: Browser + Server + Microphone check · Block entry before completion
status.mod9Detail: Microphone control · Media library · Status broadcasting · Full RTL
status.mod10Detail: Web Audio API · AnalyserNode · Live SVG bars animation
status.mod11Detail: Sends every 5 seconds · Updates LiveSession in database
status.mod12Detail: Live table · Auto-refresh every 5 seconds · Stale session detection

queue.allCategorySongsQueued: All songs from this category are in the queue
queue.randomSongAdded: Random song added to the queue

library.title: Media Library
library.bgAllowedWithMic: Allowed with mic — allowed with mic as playback policy. Preview is in-browser only and not on the live broadcast.
library.readyOnMicCloseSongs: Songs will be ready to play when the mic is closed
library.readyOnMicCloseBreaks: Breaks will be ready to play when the mic is closed
library.readyOnMicCloseAds: Ads will be ready to play when the mic is closed
library.noBgTracks: No background music. Add from the admin panel or choose files from your device.
library.noSongs: No songs in the library. Add from the admin panel or choose files from your device.
library.selectAudioFile: Choose an audio file from your device
library.selectBreakFile: Choose a break/jingle from your device
library.selectAdFile: Choose an ad/promo from your device
library.localFilesNote: Your local files — use the +Queue button to add to the queue. Preview is in-browser only and not on the broadcast.
library.noStationBreaks: No station breaks. Add from the admin panel.
library.noPresenterBreaks: No personal breaks yet — upload your break below.
library.noStationAds: No station ads. Add from the admin panel.
library.noPresenterAds: No personal ads yet — upload your ad below.

sfx.title: Sound Effects (SFX)
sfx.addFromAdmin: Add effects from the admin panel

dsp.title: Audio Processing
dsp.saveCurrentAsNew: + Save current settings as new preset

preFlight.title: Broadcast Setup
preFlight.subtitle: Select the station and program to start a broadcast session
preFlight.micDeniedHint: You have denied or blocked microphone access. Please enable the permission from your browser settings near the URL bar and refresh the page.

directDj.title: Direct DJ
directDj.subtitle: Select a radio and connect directly — no program schedule
directDj.noRadiosDesc: No radios have been added to this account. Contact administration.
directDj.micDeniedHint: Please enable microphone access from your browser settings and refresh the page.
directDj.radioSearchPlaceholder: Search radio by name or host...
directDj.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again

waitScreen.title: Waiting for Broadcast Time
waitScreen.earlyAccess: You can enter {minutes} minutes before the scheduled time
waitScreen.notYourTime: It is not your broadcast time currently
waitScreen.contactAdmin: Contact the administrator if you believe this is an error
waitScreen.studioClosed: Studio is closed until the scheduled time
waitScreen.noRecordingsHint: They will appear here after your first broadcast.

recordings.title: Recordings Archive
recordings.subtitle: Your saved audio recordings
recordings.dbError: Failed to load recordings. Please try again.
recordings.noMatchDesc: Try adjusting or clearing the filters to see more results.
recordings.noRecordingsDesc: Your audio recordings will appear here automatically after each broadcast session.

studio.title: Broadcast Studio
studio.tabAudioHint: Ensure 'Share tab audio' is checked when selecting the tab

LiveMessaging.title: Live Messages
LiveMessaging.offlineMessage: Messages are currently closed. Check back during our next live show!
LiveMessaging.name: Name
LiveMessaging.error: Failed to send message. Please try again.
LiveMessaging.disableWarning: Disabling this will hide the chat widget on the public website.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
profile.avatarUrlLabel: Or enter an image URL directly
profile.passwordChangePrompt: Enter your current password then choose a new password.
profile.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
profile.emailTakenError: Email is already used by another account.
profile.avatarUrlError: Invalid image URL. Must start with https:// or http://
profile.pwShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
profile.pwMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.

directDjRadios.title: Direct DJ Radios
directDjRadios.description: Add radios you want to connect to directly from the studio.
directDjRadios.noRadios: No radios yet. Click "+ Add Radio" to get started.
directDjRadios.savedDeactivated: Radio deactivated instead of deleted (linked to recordings) ✅
directDjRadios.errNotFound: Radio not found or not owned by you.

avatarUpload.sizeHint: JPEG · PNG · WebP · up to 5 MB
avatarUpload.fileTooLarge: Image size ({size} MB) exceeds the limit (5 MB).
